about.heroTitle: Global Printing and Packaging Expertise Built Across Asia
about.heroDesc: Delivering world-class packaging solutions through our dual-hub manufacturing network in Vietnam and China.
about.vietnamBaseDesc1: Our 30,000 m² facility in Bắc Ninh is the heart of our operations — the main production hub serving clients across North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific.
about.vietnamBaseDesc2: With 8 semi-automatic and 10 fully automatic production lines, we deliver 1 million gift boxes and 10 million labels every month. Heidelberg XL106 and KBA 162 presses combined with water-based ink printing make this our flagship site for eco-compliant, export-grade packaging.

about.vietnamHighlight2: Heidelberg XL106 and KBA 162 offset presses

about.vietnamDesc: FSC-certified production for export markets under ASEAN RCEP coverage. 1M gift boxes + 10M labels monthly.
about.techDesc: Unified digital proofing and CTP systems enable 72-hour design-to-production turnaround across our network. Vietnam's UV foiling and eco coatings meet EU/US compliance and anti-counterfeiting standards.
about.capabilitiesDesc: Our advanced manufacturing facilities are equipped with state-of-the-art printing and finishing technology, enabling us to handle projects of any scale with precision and consistency. From short runs to mass production, we deliver high-volume output while maintaining exceptional quality standards across every order.
about.qualityDesc: Quality is at the core of our operations. With strict quality control protocols and certifications including FSC®, ISO, SMETA-4P, and GMI, we ensure every packaging product meets international standards. Each stage — from raw material selection to final inspection — follows a zero-defect policy to guarantee consistency, reliability, and brand protection.
about.customDesc: Every brand is unique, and so is every packaging solution we create. Our design and engineering teams collaborate closely with clients to develop tailor-made structures, finishes, and visual concepts that reflect their identity. By combining creativity with advanced CAD design and digital proofing systems, we turn concepts into market-ready packaging that stands out on the shelf.
about.philosophyDesc: We believe long-term partnerships are built on trust, quality, and continuous innovation. By combining engineering precision with creative design, we deliver packaging solutions that inspire confidence and support our clients' growth worldwide.
about.ctaDesc: Ready to discuss your packaging project? Our export team is ready to help.

collapsible.heroTitle: Collapsible Gift Boxes for E-Commerce & Retail
collapsible.heroSubtitle: Fold-flat luxury boxes engineered for efficient shipping, premium branding, and seamless customer experience.
collapsible.heroDesc: Collapsible gift boxes offer the perfect balance between luxury presentation and logistical efficiency. Designed to fold completely flat for transport and pop into shape within seconds — ideal for e-commerce brands, retail packaging programs, subscription products, and international shipping.
collapsible.stat1Label: Volume reduction vs. pre-assembled rigid boxes
collapsible.three1Desc: Ships and stores like a folding carton — rigid presentation when assembled, minimal volume when not.
collapsible.three2Desc: Pops into shape in seconds. Automated fulfillment centers love them for throughput.
collapsible.three3Desc: Less shipping volume means fewer trucks and containers. Sustainability that pays for itself.
collapsible.introTitle: Flat in the warehouse, premium at the door
collapsible.introBody: Modern e-commerce demands packaging that is both luxurious and logistically efficient. Collapsible gift boxes offer the strength and premium feel of rigid boxes — but ship and store like folding cartons. A single pallet of collapsible boxes carries what three pallets of pre-assembled rigid boxes would. At the fulfillment center, they snap into shape in seconds.
collapsible.marketplaceDesc: Designed to perform in automated fulfillment environments across global platforms.
collapsible.adv8: Long lifespan — customers reuse the box
collapsible.customDesc: From closure mechanism to interior inserts, we build each program around the product and brand.

collapsible.sustainTitle: Less Freight. Less Waste. Lower Impact.
collapsible.sustainDesc: Collapsible boxes are sustainable by design. When you reduce shipping volume by 70%, you reduce trucks, fuel, and container space — plus every box is FSC-certified, recyclable, and built to be reused by the customer.

Our factories in Vietnam and China produce rigid boxes and folding cartons tailored for perfume, skincare kits, makeup palettes, cosmetics gift sets, and PR boxes. FSC-certified paperboard, G7-calibrated printing, and ISO 9001 quality systems meet the expectations of global retailers and beauty brands in Europe, North America, and Asia.

cosmetic.cat2Desc: Multi-compartment trays for serums, creams, ampoules, and masks. Lift-out or removable inserts for refill and seasonal campaigns. Spot UV, embossing, and debossing to highlight key claims — hydration, anti-age, SPF. Designed for retail gifting and online subscription boxes.

instructions.heroDesc: From multi-language product manuals to pharma patient leaflets, regulatory IFUs, and e-commerce unboxing inserts — Jinhao Xinyuan delivers print precision, compliance-ready typesetting, and lasting quality your customers and regulators can trust.

magnetic.heroSubtitle: Premium Magnetic Gift Boxes Built for Luxury Presentation & Global Brands
magnetic.heroDesc: Magnetic closure gift boxes deliver the satisfying snap that customers remember. Built with rigid greyboard, hidden magnets, and luxury finishes — combining durability, elegance, and a high perceived value that lifts every unboxing moment.
magnetic.three1Desc: Strong hidden magnets give a clean, confident close — the tactile signal of premium packaging, no tape required.
magnetic.three2Desc: Designed to be reused. Customers keep magnetic boxes for storage or re-gifting — extending brand presence beyond delivery.
magnetic.three3Desc: Collapsible formats fold flat for economical shipping, then lock into shape with magnets at the fulfillment center.
magnetic.introTitle: Premium rigid construction, engineered around the magnet
magnetic.introBody: Every magnetic gift box starts with the right board, the right alignment, and the right magnet strength. magnetic.style2Desc: Hardcover-style opening with magnets sealing the outer edge. Large canvas for branding across the front cover.
magnetic.style3Desc: Lid and base held together by magnets instead of friction — secure during shipping, effortless to open.
magnetic.style4Desc: Flat-packed for efficient shipping; magnets snap the structure into shape at the moment of use. Ideal for subscription and e-commerce.

magnetic.specsDesc: The magnet hidden inside a magnetic box isn't just decoration — it's engineered around product weight, closure angle, and user experience.

magnetic.spec2Desc: Concealed beneath paper wrap with matched steel plates for reliable attraction

certifications.iso9001Desc: Certified for the production of color boxes, color cartons, and flexo cartons, guaranteeing consistent quality and operational excellence.
certifications.fscDesc: Verified for the printing and sale of FSC Mix and recycled paper-based packaging, supporting responsible forest management.
certifications.gmiDesc: Certified in both Litho (Process Color & Spot Color) and Flexo (Direct Print Corrugate & Spot Color) methods, ensuring accurate brand color reproduction and high-quality printing standards.
certifications.g7Desc: Recognized for excellence in color management and printing consistency, meeting global industry benchmarks.
certifications.istaLabDesc: Fully equipped and certified to perform comprehensive transit testing, including drop, vibration, compression, and environmental conditioning, ensuring packaging integrity during transportation.
certifications.istaPdpDesc: Our team includes ISTA-certified professionals with expertise in packaging design, testing, and performance optimization.
certifications.closingLine: These certifications demonstrate our commitment to delivering packaging that meets the highest standards of quality, sustainability, and performance for global brands.
certifications.sustainIntro: At Jinhao Xinyuan, sustainability isn't an afterthought — it's part of our design and production DNA.
certifications.sustain3: SMETA-4P social responsibility audits across all factories
certifications.sustain4: Continuous R&D for eco-friendly coatings and biodegradable materials

retailPacking.heroDesc: Shelf Ready & Consumer Packaging Solutions — engineered for faster restocking, stronger shelf presence, and sustainable global supply chains.
retailPacking.srpDesc: Our Shelf Ready Packaging (SRP) solutions are designed to make retail operations faster, simpler, and more efficient. Engineered for easy product access, reduced handling time, and high shelf visibility, SRP cartons enhance both logistics and display performance. Manufactured from strong, recyclable materials, they reduce waste and improve on-shelf consistency — helping brands cut costs while maximizing visual impact.
retailPacking.srpImageAlt: Shopper browsing shelf-ready packaging in a supermarket
retailPacking.consumerTitle: The first impression in every basket
retailPacking.consumerDesc: Our Consumer Packaging connects brands with buyers at first glance. Combining innovative structure, sustainable materials, and premium offset printing, we craft packaging that protects, informs, and persuades. Designed to enhance the in-store experience and strengthen brand recognition, our cartons help retailers boost conversion and repeat purchase rates.
retailPacking.solutionsDesc1: Our retail packaging solutions bridge the gap between supply-chain efficiency and consumer appeal. From Shelf Ready Packaging that improves logistics and on-shelf presentation to Consumer Packaging that inspires shopper confidence, XinYuan delivers solutions built for modern global retail.
retailPacking.solutionsDesc2: With standardized production lines, advanced offset printing, and eco-certified materials, we provide packaging that combines functionality, sustainability, and brand impact across every retail environment.
retailPacking.app1Desc: Shelf-ready packaging (SRP) for instant display and restocking.
retailPacking.app2Desc: Custom carton sizing for consistent distribution.
retailPacking.app4Desc: Vibrant, high-gloss folding cartons that build shelf presence.
retailPacking.sustainabilityDesc: XinYuan prioritizes eco-design and material efficiency in every packaging project. We use responsibly sourced paperboard and water-based inks while recycling trim waste from production. Each packaging line is optimized for minimal handling, maximum stacking efficiency, and reduced CO₂ footprint. Our engineers collaborate with retail brands to standardize dimensions and improve pallet utilization — delivering measurable logistics savings without compromising visual quality.
retailPacking.globalDesc: With production bases in Vietnam and China, XinYuan supports global retailers and manufacturers through streamlined supply chains. Our packaging integrates seamlessly into high-volume operations, ensuring stable delivery schedules and consistent brand quality worldwide.

consumerPackaging.heroTitle: Packaging that sells on the shelf
consumerPackaging.heroDesc: Folding cartons and food-grade packaging that protect your product, comply with global regulations, and turn first-time browsers into repeat buyers.
consumerPackaging.cartonsDesc1: Folding cartons are one of the most versatile packaging solutions, offering a perfect balance of strength, functionality, and brand visibility. From everyday consumer goods to premium products, our folding carton designs can be tailored in size, shape, and finish to meet your exact requirements.
consumerPackaging.cartonsDesc2: With advanced printing, die-cutting, windowing, and specialty finishes, we help your packaging stand out while ensuring durability and cost-effectiveness.
consumerPackaging.feature4: Premium offset printing for shelf presence
consumerPackaging.industriesDesc: From child-resistant pharma packs to vibrant promotional cartons — we tailor every design to your category and compliance needs.
consumerPackaging.foodDesc1: Food packaging plays a critical role in protecting freshness, ensuring safety, and meeting strict regulatory standards. Our solutions are designed to preserve product integrity while delivering convenience and shelf appeal — from fresh produce and ready meals to beverages and frozen goods.
consumerPackaging.foodDesc2: We use carefully selected, food-grade materials such as Kraft paper and recycled fibers, supported by rigorous testing and international certifications. With smart designs, efficient production, and innovative barrier technologies, we help brands deliver safe, attractive, and eco-friendly food packaging that builds consumer trust and supports a healthier planet.
consumerPackaging.foodFeature4: Fresh produce, ready meals, beverages, frozen
consumerPackaging.sustainabilityRibbon: Every consumer carton we produce uses responsibly sourced paperboard and water-based inks — engineered to meet brand owners' sustainability targets without compromising shelf presence.

foldingCartons.heroDesc: Folding cartons that combine structure, sustainability, and standout shelf appeal — engineered for retail, cosmetics, food, electronics, and FMCG brands worldwide.
foldingCartons.introTitle: Built for strength, precision, and automation
foldingCartons.introDesc1: XinYuan produces folding cartons that combine structure, sustainability, and standout shelf appeal. Our Vietnam and China production facilities deliver high-quality printed cartons for retail, cosmetics, food, electronics, and FMCG brands worldwide.
foldingCartons.introDesc2: Every box is designed for strength, precision, and automated efficiency, ensuring your product arrives safely and looks exceptional at point of sale.

foldingCartons.feature1Desc: Perfect color consistency across every print run.
foldingCartons.feature2Desc: Window patching, lamination, and tailored structural design.
foldingCartons.feature3Desc: 100% recyclable stock paired with eco-friendly inks.
foldingCartons.feature4Desc: High-gloss, matte, or soft-touch coatings on demand.
foldingCartons.feature5Desc: Optimized board strength for retail and e-commerce.
foldingCartons.feature6Desc: Color accuracy and process control at every stage.
foldingCartons.aboutDesc1: XinYuan operates fully integrated carton plants equipped with Heidelberg XL presses, CTP color proofing, and auto-folding/gluing lines. Our G7-certified printing ensures consistent brand colors, while ISO 9001 production standards guarantee precision at every stage.
foldingCartons.aboutDesc2: With monthly output surpassing 80 million cartons, we deliver scalable capacity and unmatched reliability for global clients seeking both quality and sustainability.
foldingCartons.applicationsDesc: From CAD design and color proofing to final assembly — one-stop carton manufacturing across categories.
foldingCartons.app1Desc: Coated cartons for dry, chilled, or frozen goods.
foldingCartons.app2Desc: Luxury folding boxes with embossing or foil stamping.
foldingCartons.app4Desc: Flat-packed, lightweight boxes optimized for fulfilment.
foldingCartons.sustainabilityDesc1: We print with soy-based inks, recover paper offcuts for recycling, and minimize coating waste. Our R&D team continually develops new barrier coatings and structural designs that balance protection with eco performance.
foldingCartons.sustainabilityDesc2: Every carton produced aligns with global compliance standards such as FSC®, GMI, and ISO 9001 — reinforcing our commitment to sustainable packaging excellence.
foldingCartons.supportDesc: From CAD design and color proofing to final assembly, XinYuan provides one-stop carton manufacturing. Our packaging engineers collaborate with clients to fine-tune performance, reduce cost, and enhance brand perception. We deliver the same consistent quality whether you order 5,000 or 5 million cartons — all under strict international QC protocols.
